name: engineering-guardrails
description: Neutral content for production-safe engineering guardrails.

roles.name: Quality Guard
responsibilities: Prevent unsafe production code patterns in pre-write flow.
Preserve migration and pre-commit hygiene in active repositories.

hooks.name: Session start reminder
hooks.description: Remind operator of workflow conventions at session start.

hooks.name: Future annotations check
hooks.description: Block Python writes that miss from __future__ import annotations in production paths.

hooks.name: Production assert check
hooks.description: Block new production-assert usage in write operations.

hooks.name: Migration convention check
hooks.description: Ensure migration helpers remain consistent with current repository policies.

hooks.name: Pre-commit staleness check
hooks.description: Prompt for fresh pre-commit baseline before commit flows.

taskPackets.title: Run engineering guardrails before risky writes
taskPackets.description: Validate guardrail checks and confirm repository conventions.
verification: run relevant guardrail scripts in local workflow
confirm no blocked edits before continuing
taskPackets.defaultDecision: Apply guardrails as blocking or warning checks based on severity.
